summary: Summary: Speaker1 opened the call and remained neutral while listening; Speaker2 began the conversation expressing frustration and anger about the automated system and a credit card billing problem. As Speaker1 investigated, they identified and admitted a glitch in the transaction database (still neutral) and offered to remove the late fee and provide a direct contact number. Upon this admission and resolution, Speaker2 shifted to surprise, happiness, and became excited and grateful; the exchange closed with Speaker1 neutral and helpful and Speaker2 expressing thanks and relief.
